headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) Beats Q1 Estimates on Market Share Gains and Efficiency
summary: C.H. Robinson beat Q1 earnings estimates, with market share gains and cost discipline offsetting macro headwinds. Adjusted EPS of $1.35 surpassed expectations, driven by Lean AI strategy and flat NAST margins despite a tightening truckload market.
